info.name: Reservations
info.description: API endpoints for listing reservations. Requires CAN_VIEW_RESERVATION.

request.description: Returns all reservations (newest created first), with apartment, guest and booking agent populated. Required permission: CAN_VIEW_RESERVATION

item.name: List Reservations by Planned Check-in Window (Today's Check-ins)

query.description: Lower bound for plannedCheckIn, as a numeric UTC millisecond timestamp (Date.getTime()). Optional.
Upper bound for plannedCheckIn, as a numeric UTC millisecond timestamp. Optional.

request.description: Returns reservations whose planned check-in falls in the given window. The 'Today's Check-ins' homepage report sends [start of today, end of today] in the user's local time, converted to UTC ms via Date.getTime(). Required permission: CAN_VIEW_RESERVATION
